docs.title: System Security Plan
docs.system_boundary: The authorisation boundary comprises the production AWS accounts (us-east-1, us-west-2), the container platform, managed data stores, and the corporate SSO tenant; the boundary diagram is maintained in the SSP appendix and reconciled against the asset inventory.
docs.control_implementation_summary: Each control in the FedRAMP Moderate baseline is mapped to its implementation statement, responsible role, and supporting evidence in the control-implementation matrix (SSP appendix A).
docs.roles: System Owner, ISSO, ISSM, and Authorising Official are named with current contact details in the SSP front matter.
